# SIMS Home Healthcare

> SIMS Home Healthcare is a DHA-licensed home healthcare provider in Dubai offering 24/7 doctor visits, nursing care, lab tests, IV therapy, physiotherapy, and related medical services at home, hotel, or office.

SIMS brings DHA-approved medical care directly to patients across Dubai. Services are delivered by licensed doctors, nurses, and physiotherapists. Bookings are available 24/7 by phone or WhatsApp at +971525231028. Email: connect@simshomehealthcare.ae. Address: 207, AB Center, Sheikh Zayed Road, Al Barsha First, Dubai. Website: https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/): Overview of SIMS home healthcare services in Dubai
- [About Us](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/about): Company background, mission, and DHA licensing
- [Our Services](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services): Full catalog of home healthcare services
- [Contact Us](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/contact): Phone, email, WhatsApp, and location details
- [Blog](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/blog): Health guides and tips for patients in Dubai

## Doctor services

- [Doctor On Call](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/doctor-on-call): 24/7 DHA-certified doctor visits at home, hotel, or office
- [Doctor at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/doctor-at-home): Personalized medical care at your doorstep
- [Doctor at Hotel](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/doctor-at-hotel): Discreet medical care for hotel guests in Dubai
- [Home Visit Doctor](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/home-visit-doctor): On-demand physician home visits across Dubai

## Lab tests at home

- [Lab Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/lab-test-at-home): Home sample collection with DHA-approved lab processing
- [STD Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/std-test-at-home): Confidential STD testing with private sample collection
- [HIV Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/hiv-test-at-home): Discreet HIV testing at your location
- [NIPT Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/nipt-test-at-home): Non-invasive prenatal testing for expectant mothers
- [DNA Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/dna-test-at-home): Genetic DNA testing with home sample collection
- [Hormones Lab Test](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/hormones-lab-test): Hormone panel testing at home
- [Allergy & Food Intolerance Test](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/allergy-food-intolerance-test): Allergy and food intolerance testing at home
- [Beta HCG Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/beta-hcg-test-at-home): Pregnancy-related Beta HCG testing at home
- [Vitamin & Minerals Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/vitamin-minerals-test-at-home): Vitamin and mineral deficiency screening
- [Semen Analysis](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/semen-analysis): Fertility-related semen analysis with private collection
- [Covid PCR Test at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/covid-pcr-test-at-home): Certified COVID-19 PCR testing with home collection

## Nursing & recovery care

- [Nurse at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/nursing-care-at-home): Professional nursing care for recovery, elderly support, and ongoing needs
- [Post-Surgical Care](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/post-surgical-care): At-home monitoring, wound care, and recovery support after surgery
- [Wound Care](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/wound-care): Expert wound management and infection prevention at home
- [Dressing Care at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/dressing-care-at-home): Safe dressing changes and wound hygiene at home
- [Medication Management](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/medication-management): Medication reminders, guidance, and safe administration support
- [Urine Catheter Management](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/urine-catheter-management): Catheter care, hygiene, and infection prevention at home
- [ECG at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/ecg-at-home): Heart monitoring with ECG performed at your location
- [Injection Service at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/injection-service-at-home): Safe injections administered by trained nurses at home

## Therapy & wellness

- [IV Therapies](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/iv-therapies): IV drips for hydration, immunity, energy, and recovery at home or hotel
- [Physiotherapy at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/physiotherapy-at-home): Personalized physiotherapy for pain, mobility, and rehab
- [Oxygen Therapy at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/oxygen-therapy-at-home): Oxygen support for respiratory needs at home
- [Health Checkup at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/health-checkup-at-home): Comprehensive health screening packages at your doorstep
- [Flu Vaccination at Home](https://www.simshomehealthcare.ae/services/flu-vaccination-at-home-in-dubai): Seasonal flu vaccines administered at home in Dubai
